Functions.Name: BitIsMarked
Functions.Description: Returns whether the bit at index "Index" is set or not in the data

Params.Name: Data
Params.Description: - The integer containing the bits that are being tested against

Params.Name: Index
Params.Description: - The bit index into the Data that we are inquiring

Return.Description: - Whether the bit at index "Index" is set or not

Functions.Name: MarkBit
Functions.Description: Sets the bit at index "Index" in the data

Params.Name: Data
Params.Description: - The integer containing the bits that are being set

Params.Name: Index
Params.Description: - The bit index into the Data that we are setting

Functions.Name: ClearBit
Functions.Description: Clears the bit at index "Index" in the data

Params.Name: Data
Params.Description: - The integer containing the bits that are being cleared

Params.Name: Index
Params.Description: - The bit index into the Data that we are clearing

Functions.Name: ClearAllBits
Functions.Description: Clears all of the bit in the data

Params.Name: Data
Params.Description: - The integer containing the bits that are being cleared

Functions.Name: HasUnmarkedBit
Functions.Description: Returns whether there exists an unmarked bit in the data

Params.Name: Data
Params.Description: - The data being tested against

Params.Name: NumBits
Params.Description: - The logical number of bits we want to track

Return.Description: - Whether there is a bit not marked in the data

Functions.Name: HasMarkedBit
Functions.Description: Returns whether there exists a marked bit in the data

Params.Name: Data
Params.Description: - The data being tested against

Params.Name: NumBits
Params.Description: - The logical number of bits we want to track

Return.Description: - Whether there is a bit marked in the data

Functions.Name: GetUnmarkedBit
Functions.Description: Gets an already unmarked bit and returns the bit index selected

Params.Name: Data
Params.Description: - The integer containing the bits that are being set

Params.Name: StartIdx
Params.Description: - The index to start with when determining the selection'

Params.Name: NumBits
Params.Description: - The logical number of bits we want to track

Params.Name: bRandom
Params.Description: - Whether to select a random index or not

Return.Description: - The index that was selected (returns INDEX_NONE if there was no unmarked bits to choose from)

Functions.Name: GetRandomUnmarkedBit
Functions.Description: Gets a random not already marked bit and returns the bit index selected

Params.Name: Data
Params.Description: - The integer containing the bits that are being set

Params.Name: NumBits
Params.Description: - The logical number of bits we want to track

Return.Description: - The index that was selected (returns INDEX_NONE if there was no unmarked bits to choose from)

Functions.Name: GetFirstUnmarkedBit
Functions.Description: Gets the first index not already marked starting from a specific index and returns the bit index selected

Params.Name: Data
Params.Description: - The integer containing the bits that are being set

Params.Name: StartIdx
Params.Description: - The index to start looking for an available index from

Params.Name: NumBits
Params.Description: - The logical number of bits we want to track

Return.Description: - The index that was selected (returns INDEX_NONE if there was no unmarked bits to choose from)

Params.Name: Enum
Params.Description: - Enumeration

Params.Name: EnumeratorValue
Params.Description: - Value of searched enumeration

Return.Description: - name of the searched enumerator, or NAME_None

Functions.Name: GetEnumeratorUserFriendlyName
Functions.Description: Gets enumerator name as FString. Use DeisplayName when possible.

Params.Name: Enum
Params.Description: - Enumeration

Params.Name: EnumeratorValue
Params.Description: - Value of searched enumeration

Return.Description: - name of the searched enumerator, or NAME_None

Params.Name: Enum
Params.Description: - Enumeration

Return.Description: - if EnumeratorIndex is valid return EnumeratorIndex, otherwise return MAX value of Enum

Params.Name: Enum
Params.Description: - Enumeration

Params.Name: EnumeratorIndex
Params.Description: - Input index

Return.Description: - The value of the enumerator, or INDEX_NONE
